creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
8r.enc is installed:
pkg info -xl tex-dvipsk|grep 8r
        /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/base/8r.enc
        /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/cm-lgc/8r-mod.enc
        /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/context/q-8r.enc
        /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/enc/dvips/txfonts/tx8r.enc
        /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/fonts/map/dvips/pslatex/pcrr8rn.map

HOwever, I get this error:


!pdfTeX error: pdflatex (file 8r.enc): cannot open encoding file for reading
 ==> Fatal error occurred, no output PDF file produced!
*** Error code 1

Thanks
